narrative:
Tallmadge City has 13,589 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.4 percentage points.
